en: been taking a dump since Wednesday morning.
I didn't even know you were sexually active. Who is the kid?
ko: 너가 그런 줄 몰랐어. 성관계가 있었구나.

en: The baby? I don't really know much about it other than it has fingernails, allegedly.
Really? Yeah. No, I mean, who is the father, do you know?
ko: 아니, 나는 몰라. 아빠가 누구야, Juno?

en: What? I didn't think he had it in him. I know, right?
Right. This is no laughing matter. No, it's not.
ko: 이건 농담이 아니야. 농담이 아니고, 폴리는 사실 괜찮아.

en: And, you know, Pauly is actually great in... Okay. ...in chair.
You're thinking about adoption? Yeah, yeah.
ko: 응, 응. 그리고 이 부부가 있어, 아이를 가지려고 5년 동안 노력했대.

en: And there's this couple, they haven't had, you know, they've been trying to have a kid for like five years.
ko: 너가 그들을 페니 세이버에서 찾았다고? 이국적인 새들 옆에서?

en: We found them in the penny saver next to the exotic birds.
ko: 다음 주말에 그들을 만나러 갈 예정이야.

en: And they have a legitimate lawyer, and I was going to go meet with them next weekend.
ko: 다음 주말에 그들과 함께. 준버그, 그건 정말 힘든 일이야.

en: Oh, Junebug, that is a tough, tough thing to do.
